title: MrConorAE's Small Changes
description:
Just a few minor tweaks to the font, GUI, and icons.
A personal project, but I thought I'd share it.
body:
## My personal tweaks to Minecraft's font, GUI, and icons.

I've changed:
- the font: it's mostly the same, but I've changed some letters to fix things that annoyed me - e.g.
  - the cross bar in the "A", "B", "E", "F", "G", "H", and "S" being too high
  - the "K" and "X" being uneven
  - the lowercase "f" not having a hook
- the icons:
  - the enchantment bar is now a gradient from a light green to a dark green
  - the "pinging" icon in the server list has a new animation
- the GUI/HUD:
  - a new crosshair
  - a smaller, more compact attack indicator under the crosshair

Check the gallery to see the full new font and icons.
